column2: (ED:Plots) Show list of undesirable plot backers
This decision allows you to view a list of all of the backers of your current plot who may be undesirable in some way, so that you can ask them to stop backing it.
The §Y(ED:Plots) Undesirable Plot Backers§! event window is NOT open
The §Y(ED:Plots) Undesirable Plot Backers§! event window has been open for at least 3 months
Open the §Y(ED:Plots) Undesirable Plot Backers§! event window
Has at least one plot backer §Ycontributing negative plot power§!
Has at least one plot backer with §Yan undesirable plotter trait§!
Has at least one plot backer with §Yless than 5 intrigue§!

This window shows all of your plot backers who may be undesirable in some way so that, if you wish, you can send them a "Stop Backing Plot" request.\nNB1: Ensure auto-invite is turned OFF before sending the request.\nNB2: If there are more than 9 characters in a category, the option's name will include "(too many!)", and it will have 9 random portraits.
